name: ghostty
description: Control Ghostty terminal emulator via CLI. Manage windows, tabs, splits, and configuration.
capabilities: Create and manage terminal windows and tabs
Navigate between split panes in multiple directions
Increase, decrease, or reset font size
List available themes, fonts, and keybindings
Show current configuration and validate config files
author: Dicklesworthstone
securitySummary: Pure documentation skill containing only markdown documentation about Ghostty CLI commands. No executable code, scripts, network calls, or file system access beyond its own documentation file. All 54 static findings are false positives caused by the scanner misinterpreting documentation content as executable code.
valueStatement: Managing terminal windows and tabs manually slows down workflow. This skill provides a complete reference for Ghostty terminal emulator CLI commands. It enables quick window creation, tab management, split navigation, and configuration control without memorizing syntax.
limitations: Ghostty terminal must be installed on the system
Only works on macOS with Ghostty installed at default location
Does not provide terminal automation within shell sessions

useCases.title: Multi-pane development
useCases.description: Create split terminal panes and navigate between them quickly for coding workflows

useCases.title: Terminal workspace setup
useCases.description: Launch terminal with specific configurations, themes, and working directories

useCases.title: Workflow optimization
useCases.description: Manage multiple terminal sessions with keyboard shortcuts and CLI commands

promptTemplates.prompt: What actions are available in Ghostty terminal emulator?

promptTemplates.prompt: Create a new window in Ghostty terminal

promptTemplates.prompt: Navigate to the split pane below in Ghostty

bestPractices: Use IPC commands with the +action syntax to control a running Ghostty instance
List available actions with ghostty +list-actions to discover new features
Validate configuration files before reloading to catch syntax errors
antiPatterns: Running ghostty commands without Ghostty installed will fail silently
Using IPC actions when Ghostty is not running will not work
Forgetting to use the + prefix for actions will treat them as arguments instead

faq.question: Where is Ghostty installed by default?
faq.answer: Ghostty is typically installed at /Applications/Ghostty.app/Contents/MacOS/ghostty on macOS.

faq.question: What actions can I perform on a running Ghostty instance?
faq.answer: You can create windows, tabs, splits, navigate between them, toggle fullscreen, and reload config.

faq.question: How do I list all available Ghostty themes?
faq.answer: Run ghostty +list-themes to see all available color themes.

faq.question: Is my data safe when using this skill?
faq.answer: Yes. This skill only reads documentation. No data is collected or transmitted.

faq.question: Why are my ghostty commands not working?
faq.answer: Ensure Ghostty is installed and running. IPC actions require a running Ghostty instance.

faq.question: How is this different from other terminal skills?
faq.answer: This skill is specific to Ghostty and provides its unique IPC action system for window management.
